heading: Museum volunteers
label: 7142c Museum volunteers
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Miscellaneous Appropriations Act, 2001, and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2001, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Authority to use volunteers
children.label: a Authority to use volunteers
children.text: The Secretary may recruit, train, and accept the services of individuals or entities as volunteers for services or activities related to the Museum.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), service by a volunteer under subsection (a) shall not be considered Federal employment.

children.heading: Federal Tort Claims Act
children.label: A Federal Tort Claims Act
children.text: For purposes of chapter 171 of title 28, a volunteer under subsection (a) shall be treated as an employee of the Government (as defined in section 2671 of that title).

children.heading: Compensation for work injuries
children.label: B Compensation for work injuries
children.text: For purposes of subchapter I of chapter 81 of title 5, a volunteer described in subsection (a) shall be treated as an employee (as defined in ).section 8101 of title 5

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: c Compensation
children.text: A volunteer under subsection (a) shall serve without pay, but may receive nominal awards and reimbursement for incidental expenses, including expenses for a uniform or transportation in furtherance of Museum activities.
